welcome.title: Volt Time Charger
welcome.subtitle: Connect your Volt Time EV charger to Homey.
welcome.body: You will need a Personal Access Token from your Volt Time Cloud account. Create one at developer.volttime.com and paste it in the next step.

token.title: Personal Access Token
token.body: Create a Personal Access Token in Volt Time Cloud and paste it below. The app will use it to read charger status and send charge control commands.

errors.enter_token: Please enter a Personal Access Token.
errors.invalid_token: Invalid or expired token. Please verify your Personal Access Token and try again.
errors.no_chargers: No chargers found on your Volt Time account.
errors.could_not_retrieve: Could not retrieve chargers from Volt Time Cloud.
errors.network_error: Could not reach Volt Time Cloud. Please check your internet connection.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
